title: Vulp's Head Fox
description: A small Mod to add a Fox onto your Head
body:
A small client Side Mod to add a fox ontop of the Players head providing a little Partner to adventure with you.

**DISCLAIMER: The Fox is only Visibile to YOU and no one else**

_Abilities of the Fox:_
- slow breathing 
- twitching its head
- Change Variants with the /foxAppearance Command
